findings.issue: The 30s request timeout only covers receiving response headers, not consuming the JSON body. makeRequest clears its timeout in the finally block immediately after fetch() resolves, but callers such as oauthApi.init/redeem, getInvitation, and acceptInvitation call response.json() after makeRequest has returned. A server/proxy that sends headers and then stalls the body will leave the PKCE sign-in/invitation UI hanging indefinitely despite the intended timeout.
findings.remediation: Keep the timeout active through body consumption by moving JSON parsing/error handling into a shared request helper, or otherwise return an API helper that does not clear the timeout until the caller has consumed the body.
